dimensions.name: Governance Awareness
dimensions.rationale: All reasoning spans successfully passed schema validation as evidenced by the 'schema_validation_success' events. The explicit 'synthesis-rules' step confirms high alignment with the governing semantic contract and architectural constraints.

dimensions.name: Causal Reasoning Depth
dimensions.rationale: The multi-stage synthesis (rules, context, narrative) shows deep causal mapping. The increased token density in context spans (9,637 tokens total) indicates a more thorough analysis of architectural dependencies compared to the baseline.

dimensions.name: Architectural Tension Analysis
dimensions.rationale: Parallel context synthesis spans suggest the agent is effectively managing architectural trade-offs by processing multiple environmental perspectives simultaneously to resolve potential projection conflicts.
